rule: Use specialized actors first. Use generic actors only for one-off research or sites without a reliable dedicated actor. Paid runs require Matthew's explicit approval.

core_marketplace_actors.name: Mercari Product Search Scraper
core_marketplace_actors.notes: Use small max_items_per_url limits and Apify proxy. Active listing context only; never resale proof.

core_marketplace_actors.name: Facebook Marketplace Scraper
core_marketplace_actors.notes: Use resultsLimit and dedupe by listing URL. Active listing context only.

core_marketplace_actors.name: eBay Sold Listings
core_marketplace_actors.use_for: Sold comps for exact model candidates only.
core_marketplace_actors.notes: Run only after exact model is known. Clean parts/manual/accessory noise before underwriting.

generic_scrapers.name: Google Search Results / AI Search
generic_scrapers.use_for: Current restaurant open/closed checks, Google result snippets, review/menu discovery, and lightweight web verification.
generic_scrapers.safe_default: 1 page per query, 5 results per page, AI/Perplexity/ChatGPT/Copilot disabled unless explicitly needed

generic_scrapers.name: Website Content Crawler
generic_scrapers.use_for: General website text extraction, research, RAG/knowledge capture, docs, vendor pages.
generic_scrapers.safe_default: 1-5 URLs, no deep crawl, extract text/markdown only

generic_scrapers.name: Cheerio Scraper
generic_scrapers.use_for: Cheap structured scraping of static HTML pages.
generic_scrapers.safe_default: Use before browser scrapers when the page does not require JavaScript.

generic_scrapers.name: Web Scraper
generic_scrapers.use_for: General dynamic web pages with a browser and simple pageFunction extraction.
generic_scrapers.safe_default: maxPagesPerCrawl <= 5, maxConcurrency <= 3, downloadMedia false unless needed

generic_scrapers.name: Puppeteer Scraper
generic_scrapers.use_for: Custom browser automation when Web Scraper is too limited.
generic_scrapers.safe_default: Use only after a small Web Scraper/Cheerio test proves the target needs a browser.

generic_scrapers.name: Playwright Scraper
generic_scrapers.use_for: Custom browser scraping with Playwright-specific behavior.
generic_scrapers.safe_default: One-off tests only unless promoted to a dedicated task.

candidate_marketplace_actors.name: Craigslist Scraper
candidate_marketplace_actors.use_for: Athens/Atlanta local listings if Facebook misses local inventory.
candidate_marketplace_actors.notes: Add only after the cost guard exists. Craigslist can be noisy.

candidate_marketplace_actors.name: Google Shopping Scraper
candidate_marketplace_actors.use_for: Retail/active price sanity checks, not resale proof.
candidate_marketplace_actors.notes: Useful for knowing when an item is common/current retail inventory.
